Spesifikasi studio jakarta unit C 2021 :
lighting di rigging atas :
- Kapasitas PSBB : 15 pax + 10 mobil
- Lighting di rigging atas =  (Godox SL 60 + lantern) x 6 unit dan (Godox SL 150 + strip light) x 2 unit
Lighting di stand :
- Lighting di stand rigg (Godox SL 150 + octa box) x 2 unit
TV LED 40 inch + stand + HDMI 5 meter x 2 unit 
green screen limbo convex ukuran 6.5 x 9.7 meter
internet 2x line UP TO speed 70 mbps 1.1 (not dedicated)
listrik 11.000 watt dikurangi AC 5.5 PK spare 4.000 watt
Rigging alumunium 45 x 45 gawangan LED 7.90 x 6.90 m
Rigging alumunium 30 x 30 modul LED 6 meter
Rigging alumunium 30 x 30 modul Speaker 1 meter
